command: $file = 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py'; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $fixed = 0; $i = 0; while($i -lt $lines.Count - 1) { $line = $lines[$i]; $quotes = ($line.ToCharArray() | Where-Object {$_ -eq '"'}).Count; $singleQ = ($line.ToCharArray() | Where-Object {$_ -eq "'"}).Count; if(($quotes % 2 -ne 0) -or ($line.TrimEnd() -match '"$' -and $lines[$i+1].Trim() -match '^"?\)')) { $lines[$i] = $lines[$i].TrimEnd() + $lines[$i+1].TrimStart(); $newLines = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new($lines); $newLines.RemoveAt($i+1); $lines = $newLines.ToArray(); Write-Output "Fixed line $($i+1): $($lines[$i].Trim())"; $fixed++; } else { $i++ } }; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines($file, $lines, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); Write-Output "Total fixed: $fixed lines"
description: إصلاح شامل لجميع أسطر الـ string المقسمة في code_analyzer.py
